name: Cipher Digital Inc.
summary: PART I . Unless the context otherwise requires, references in this Annual Report to the Company, Cipher, Cipher Digital, we, us or our refers to Cipher Digital Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries, unless otherwise indicated. Business Overview We are dedicated to developing and operating industrial-scale data centers engineered for next-generation computing at the highest standards of innovation, precision, and excellence.
